# Footprints

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Footprints;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Footprints { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
steps, walking, foot, feet, trail, shoe

## Categories
navigation
